records.question: What addresses are there in Ericamouth, Louisiana with zip code 75074 for customers with the last name Bernhard who became customers on 2016-05-11 17:03:48, have email everette.goyette@example.org, phone number 07278206718, and status Bad Customer?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT addresses.address_id FROM addresses
JOIN customers ON addresses.address_id = customers.customer_address_id
WHERE addresses.city = 'Ericamouth' AND addresses.state_province_county = 'Louisiana' AND addresses.zip_postcode = '75074' AND customers.date_became_customer = '2016-05-11 17:03:48' AND customers.email_address = 'everette.goyette@example.org' AND customers.customer_status_code = 'Bad Customer' AND customers.phone_number = '07278206718' AND customers.last_name = 'Bernhard'
records.pred_sql: SELECT T1.address_id FROM Addresses AS T1 INNER JOIN Customers AS T2 ON T1.address_id = T2.customer_address_id WHERE T1.city = 'Ericamouth' AND T1.state_province_county = 'Louisiana' AND T1.zip_postcode = '75074' AND T2.last_name = 'Bernhard' AND T2.date_became_customer = '2016-05-11 17:03:48' AND T2.email_address = 'everette.goyette@example.org' AND T2.phone_number = '07278206718' AND T2.customer_status_code = 'Bad Customer'

records.question: Which addresses belong to customers named Dameon who are Bad Customers, were born on or after 1996-08-30 06:17:50, have an outstanding amount of 9332.0, and became customers on or before 2015-09-25 13:59:21, where the staff at that address left exactly on 2018-02-26 17:56:31?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT addresses.address_id FROM addresses
JOIN staff ON addresses.address_id = staff.staff_address_id
JOIN customers ON addresses.address_id = customers.customer_address_id
WHERE customers.customer_status_code = 'Bad Customer' AND customers.date_of_birth >= '1996-08-30 06:17:50' AND customers.first_name = 'Dameon' AND staff.date_left_staff = '2018-02-26 17:56:31' AND customers.date_became_customer <= '2015-09-25 13:59:21' AND customers.amount_outstanding = 9332.0
records.pred_sql: SELECT T1.address_id FROM Addresses AS T1 INNER JOIN Customers AS T2 ON T1.address_id = T2.customer_address_id INNER JOIN Staff AS T3 ON T1.address_id = T3.staff_address_id WHERE T2.first_name = 'Dameon' AND T2.customer_status_code = 'Bad Customer' AND T2.date_of_birth >= '1996-08-30 06:17:50' AND T2.amount_outstanding = 9332.0 AND T2.date_became_customer <= '2015-09-25 13:59:21' AND T3.date_left_staff = '2018-02-26 17:56:31'

records.question: What addresses are linked to staff whose middle name is Duane and who left on 2018-03-05 18:30:12, and are also associated with customers?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT addresses.address_id FROM addresses
JOIN staff ON addresses.address_id = staff.staff_address_id
JOIN customers ON addresses.address_id = customers.customer_address_id
WHERE staff.date_left_staff = '2018-03-05 18:30:12' AND staff.middle_name = 'Duane'
records.pred_sql: SELECT T1.address_id FROM Addresses AS T1 INNER JOIN Staff AS T2 ON T1.address_id = T2.staff_address_id WHERE T2.middle_name = 'Duane' AND T2.date_left_staff = '2018-03-05 18:30:12' INTERSECT SELECT T1.address_id FROM Addresses AS T1 INNER JOIN Customers AS T2 ON T1.address_id = T2.customer_address_id

records.question: Which addresses in Port Melyssa are linked to staff with last name Mraz and to customers who became customers exactly on 2015-09-25 13:59:21?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT addresses.address_id FROM addresses
JOIN staff ON addresses.address_id = staff.staff_address_id
JOIN customers ON addresses.address_id = customers.customer_address_id
WHERE customers.date_became_customer = '2015-09-25 13:59:21' AND staff.last_name = 'Mraz' AND addresses.city = 'Port Melyssa'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT
  T1.address_id
FROM Addresses AS T1
INNER JOIN Staff AS T2
  ON T1.address_id = T2.staff_address_id
INNER JOIN Customers AS T3
  ON T1.address_id = T3.customer_address_id
WHERE
  T1.city = 'Port Melyssa' AND T2.last_name = 'Mraz' AND T3.date_became_customer = '2015-09-25 13:59:21'
